goal: Research {topic} from multiple angles and produce a synthesized report

steps.prompt: Survey the current landscape of {topic}. Identify the major projects, their maturity, license, governance model, and primary use cases. Output a {output_format} report with a one-paragraph summary per project and a comparison matrix at the end.

Analyze technical trade-offs for {topic}. Compare on: indexing algorithms, recall vs. latency curves, scaling story, operational complexity, and ecosystem integrations. Cite primary sources (project docs, benchmark papers). Output a {output_format} report.

Document real-world adoption of {topic}. Find case studies, production deployments, and post-mortems. Note workload sizes, failure modes, and migration patterns. Output a {output_format} report grouped by company/project.
Review the three research tracks before synthesis

checkpoint_config.message: All three research tracks complete (landscape.md, tradeoffs.md, adoption.md). Review before generating the synthesis.

steps.prompt: Read landscape.md, tradeoffs.md, and adoption.md and produce a single {output_format} report on {topic}. Structure: executive summary, recommended shortlist, decision matrix, open questions. Cite the source artifacts inline.
